changelog: Rewrote `standalone-scripts/prompts/22-release/prompt.md` (and mirror `.lovable/prompts/14-release.md`) with the concise 8-step MINOR-default ceremony, explicit mirror-parity clause, and hard rules against ask-for-confirmation, PATCH auto-bumps, or em dashes. Bumped `info.json` to `3.0.0`.

Bumped project version pins to `v4.296.0` across `version.json`, `manifest.json`, `src/shared/constants.ts`, macro-controller/marco-sdk/lovable-*/xpath/payment-banner-hider instruction files, shared-state, telemetry schema version, and root `readme.md` install snippets.
